title: Carina Event (v0.3)
description: The canonical, append-only state-change record. Replay re-derives a frontier from its event log.

kind.description: Event kind: finding.asserted, finding.reviewed, finding.note_added, finding.span_repaired, finding.entity_resolved, evidence_atom.locator_repaired, frontier.synced_with_peer, frontier.conflict_detected, frontier.conflict_resolved, bridge.reviewed, replication.deposited, prediction.deposited, ...

payload.description: Kind-specific payload. See docs/PROTOCOL.md §6 for normative shapes per kind.
